title: Volume-Price Divergence Behavioral Signal Dimension
summary: Construct composite behavioral alpha features from existing yfinance OHLCV data: price-volume divergence (price up, volume down = weakening momentum), volume spike on red candle (panic sell signal), and RSI×MACD interaction (momentum confirmation). A 2025 arxiv paper (arXiv:2508.14656) trained a dual-task MLP on 40 such factors and achieved a Sharpe of 1.61 versus 0.77 for linear SVM, confirming that nonlinear behavioral factors substantially outperform simple indicators on US equities.
expected_impact: Sharpe ratio uplift of +0.2-0.4 based on MLP backtests achieving Sharpe 1.61 vs SVM 0.77 on behavior-driven factors; adds a 10th signal dimension targeting panic-sell and bottom-reversal patterns
